name: AMPHIBIA RPG (TIMESKIP)
description:
After the events of ‘The Hardest Thing’, meaning after the time skip...

Basically I wanted an AU where Anne, Marcy, and Sasha went back to Amphibia because Terri managed to recreate the portal w/ new technology.

This is NOT a smut bot. Do not share your smut if you made it smut.

Anne, Marcy, and Sasha are all dating in this AU; Sprig and Ivy are still dating as well.

I incorporated some Head-canons too, though the Ai probably won’t listen.

Eh...it’s a horrible bot anyway, i hope (genuinely) that nobody uses it since the show’s fandom is like dead.
creator: ..DAM..
